series_metadata.series_title: Supporting Data of Base Rates and Merit Rate Rating for Private Employer Rate Calculation
series_metadata.series_description: This information is used to calculate rates for Private Employers (PA) including payroll, losses, expected loss rates, limited loss ratios, and experience modifiers.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in the Actuarial Unit for 25 years, and then destroy. ; Microform: Retain Microfiche in the Actuarial Unit for 25 years, and then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain electronic records for 25 years on the (WCIS) Workers Comp Insurance System, Rates and Payments and BWC shared drives, and then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Microform: Burn ; Electronic: Delete
